# Viewfinder Card Actions Menu

## Goals

1. **Move star inline with title** — favorite star sits to the right of the card title (not in the header), with the title row keeping its natural height.
2. **Add "..." actions menu** — replace the top-right star position with a kebab (•••) menu dropdown containing Edit and Delete actions, context-aware per item type.
3. **Edit & Delete operations** — Edit opens a modal to change name/description/author; Delete shows a confirmation then removes the artifact via server APIs.

## Problem

The viewfinder card currently shows the favorite star in the top-right header alongside badge/flows/pages. The user wants:
- Star moved inline with the title text
- A "..." menu in the top-right that opens a dropdown with Edit/Delete
- Edit modal (similar to create modal) for name, description, author
- Delete confirmation dialog that actually deletes via APIs

## Approach

### Client changes (Viewfinder.jsx + Viewfinder.module.css)

1. **Card layout**: Move `StarBtn` from `cardHeader > cardActions` to a new `cardTitleRow` that wraps title + star. Keep title row height = title line-height (star can overflow into description).
2. **Actions menu**: Add `KebabHorizontalIcon` from octicons in the `cardHeader > cardActions` replacing the star. Use `@base-ui/react/menu` (already imported) for the dropdown.
3. **Menu items**: "Edit {Canvas|Prototype}" and "Delete {Canvas|Prototype}" based on `item.type`. Components get edit/delete too.
4. **EditForm component**: Similar to CreateForm — modal/overlay with name, description, author fields. Pre-populated from item data. Submits to update APIs.
5. **DeleteConfirmation component**: Simple confirmation dialog. On confirm, calls delete API.
6. **State management**: Use useState in ArtifactCard for menu open, edit modal, delete confirmation (these are ephemeral UI state, not storyboard data).

### Server changes

1. **Canvas server** (`packages/core/src/canvas/server.js`):
   - `DELETE /delete-canvas` — delete entire canvas directory (`.canvas.jsonl` + folder)
   - `PUT /update-meta` — update canvas `.meta.json` (name, description, author)

2. **Prototype server** (`packages/core/src/workshop/features/createPrototype/server.js`):
   - `DELETE /prototypes` — delete prototype directory
   - `PUT /prototypes` — update `.prototype.json` metadata

## Files to change

- `packages/react/src/Viewfinder.jsx` — card layout, actions menu, edit/delete modals
- `packages/react/src/Viewfinder.module.css` — new styles for title row, menu, modals
- `packages/core/src/canvas/server.js` — delete-canvas + update-meta endpoints
- `packages/core/src/workshop/features/createPrototype/server.js` — delete + update prototype endpoints

## Steps

1. Add server APIs (canvas delete/update-meta, prototype delete/update)
2. Restructure ArtifactCard layout (move star to title row, add kebab menu)
3. Add CSS for new layout
4. Build EditForm component
5. Build DeleteConfirmation component  
6. Wire everything together
7. Test build

## Edge cases & risks

- Deleting a prototype that's inside a `.folder` — need to handle nested paths
- Canvas can be single-file or multi-page folder — delete needs to handle both
- Components (stories) don't have prototype.json — skip edit/delete for components initially
- Need to prevent card link navigation when clicking menu/star buttons (stopPropagation)
